extortion.description: [AI generated] "Dinnebiergruppe.de" is a German company incorporated into the automobile industry. They are authorized dealers for major car brands including Mercedes-Benz, smart, Audi, Porsche, and Volkswagen Commercial Vehicles. The company offers a broad range of services including car sales, leasing, financing, insurance, and extensive car maintenance. Moreover, they are also involved in real estate management, hotel industry, and operate petrol stations.
